recommendations.title: The Weather Man
recommendations.overview: A Chicago weather man, separated from his wife and children, debates whether professional and personal success are mutually exclusive.

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl

recommendations.title: A Cure for Wellness
recommendations.overview: An ambitious young executive is sent to retrieve his company's CEO from an idyllic but mysterious "wellness center" at a remote location in the Swiss Alps but soon suspects that the spa's miraculous treatments are not what they seem.

recommendations.title: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
recommendations.overview: A 'Man from the Future' arrives at an LA diner where he must recruit the precise combination of disgruntled patrons to join him on a one-night quest to save the world from the terminal threat of a rogue artificial intelligence.

recommendations.title: MouseHunt

recommendations.title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest

recommendations.title: Some Like It Hot
recommendations.overview: In Prohibition-era Chicago, musicians Joe and Jerry witness a mob hit, and flee the state in an all-female band disguised as Josephine and Daphne, but further complications set in.
